arts.ttl: Roma Thinking Big for Their Next Coaching Appointment
arts.sum: Roma will have plenty of time to choose their next coach having gone with a glorified caretaker manager. Claudio Ranieri will influence the choice, as he’ll become a consultant to the ownership next year. They have three Italians on their radar.
